## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Ben Kent for the Account Director role.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Role Evolution:** The Account Director role is shifting from dedicated pods to a pooled, ticketing model. This optimizes director time for high-value strategic work (e.g., SEO audits) by offloading daily client comms to Account Managers.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Candidate Fit:** Ben Kent's 10 years of SEO experience, including building departments from scratch (Known, MRM), directly addresses the company's urgent need for more technical SEO capacity to match its growing client base.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [**Strategic Acumen:** Kent demonstrated the ability to lead complex projects (Sesame Workshop migration) and manage difficult stakeholders, turning a challenging partner relationship into a strong advocate.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Company Context:** GrowthX is a 1-year-old company scaling rapidly (\~50 delivery staff). This growth creates a dynamic environment with evolving roles, requiring adaptable team members.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)

## Topics

### The Evolving Account Director Role at GrowthX

  - [The company is evolving its structure to support two business models: a traditional services org and a new product-led org built around a proprietary AI content platform.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**New Operating Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [**Pods:** Account Manager (daily comms, PM) + Managing Editor (AI platform ops).](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [**Directors:** Pooled resource for high-value strategic work (e.g., SEO audits, content strategy).](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Optimizes director time for strategic tasks that don't require weekly client meetings, while allowing for flexible director assignment based on client needs (e.g., technical vs. editorial focus).](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

### Candidate Experience & Strategic Approach

  - [**SEO Philosophy:** Views generative AI as making SEO more critical than ever, not obsolete.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [**Example:** Educated Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center's board on SEO's long-game value to manage unrealistic expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [**Strategic Initiative Example (Sesame Workshop):**](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [Led the migration and redesign of `sesameworkshop.org`.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [**Process:** Coordinated calendars and deliverables across internal teams and a third-party engineering firm.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Managed a partner at Known who proposed unfeasible projects.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
          - [**Resolution:** Used side chats to realign on scope and budget.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
          - [**Outcome:** The partner later recommended Kent for continued work after Known's SEO department was laid off, demonstrating a successful relationship recovery.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [**Management Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
      - [Built SEO departments from scratch at Known and MRM.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
      - [No direct reports at Known due to budget cuts, but partnered closely with analytics and engineering teams.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Supported strategists at MRM on client kickoffs (e.g., Benjamin Moore).](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)

### GrowthX's Client Strategy & AI Platform

  - [**Client Onboarding:** All new clients complete an 8-week "strategy sprint."](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1838.0)
      - [**Goal:** Deep dives with client teams (product, engineering, sales) to create "artifacts" (e.g., tone guides) that inform AI workflow guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [**AI Platform:** Uses templated pipelines with "Madlibs" for customization.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
      - [**Process:** Directors define rules (e.g., research sources, competitor exclusions) by referencing client-specific documents, not by writing code.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tucker:** Contact Ben Kent with next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/5Kb2-_WGCKgcUmvrwbA3nzTrS9ruyVgv?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
